# LidLift MCP — Tool Dissonance Control Plane

> MCP server for managing tool dissonance in AI agent systems.
> Part of the LID-LIFT Technical Suite by Igor Holt.

## Features
- Tool dissonance detection and resolution
- MCP 2024-11-05 protocol compliant
- Podman/Docker deployment ready
- EU AI Act Annex XI governance

## Integration
- Works with Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, Gemini
- Genesis Conductor Ambient Access Layer compatible

## Creator
Igor Holt — AI Architect
